inputs.label: Sum of Squares Between (SSB)
inputs.businessContext: Variation attributable to the differences between group means.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variation attributable to the differences between group means.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Grup ortalamaları arasındaki farklılıklardan kaynaklanan varyasyon.
businessContext_i18n.de: Variation, die auf die Unterschiede zwischen den Gruppenmittelwerten zurückzuführen ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Variation attribuable aux différences entre les moyennes des groupes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Variación atribuible a las diferencias entre las medias de los grupos.

inputs.label: Sum of Squares Within (SSW)
inputs.businessContext: Variation within groups, due to random error or individual differences.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variation within groups, due to random error or individual differences.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gruplar içindeki rastgele hata veya bireysel farklılıklardan kaynaklanan varyasyon.
businessContext_i18n.de: Variation innerhalb der Gruppen, bedingt durch zufällige Fehler oder individuelle Unterschiede.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Variation au sein des groupes, due à l'erreur aléatoire ou aux différences individuelles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Variación dentro de los grupos, debida a error aleatorio o diferencias individuales.

inputs.label: Degrees of Freedom Within (dfW)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of observations minus number of groups (N-k).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of observations minus number of groups (N-k).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam gözlem sayısı eksi grup sayısı (N-k).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Beobachtungen minus Anzahl der Gruppen (N-k).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'observations moins le nombre de groupes (N-k).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de observaciones menos el número de grupos (N-k).

inputs.label: Significance Level (α)
inputs.businessContext: Threshold for statistical significance, probability of Type I error.

businessContext_i18n.en: Threshold for statistical significance, probability of Type I error.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstatistiksel anlamlılık için eşik, Tip I hata olasılığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schwellenwert für statistische Signifikanz, Wahrscheinlichkeit eines Fehlers 1. Art.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Seuil de signification statistique, probabilité d'erreur de type I.
businessContext_i18n.es: Umbral de significación estadística, probabilidad de error tipo I.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
